hero.subtitle: Plant real seeds, paint your pot, and watch memories bloom — your child's very own magical growing world.

ai.subtitle: Try a magical message from your plant!

tree.title: Digital Memory Tree
tree.desc: Each leaf holds a photo, video or journal entry. Watch your tree grow as your child grows.

pot.title: Paint Your Pot
pot.desc: Decorate a real terracotta pot with acrylic paints. Every pot is a one-of-a-kind masterpiece.

ai.title: AI Story Magic
ai.desc: AI creates cute captions and monthly story recaps so every memory has its own fairy tale.

buddy.title: Plant Buddy Collection
buddy.desc: Collect rare plant buddies with personalities, stages and special powers to unlock.

vip.title: VIP Golden Garden
vip.desc: Unlock nighttime mode, seasonal effects and the legendary golden memory tree.

family.title: Family Memories
family.desc: Share milestones with grandparents. Print your tree as a keepsake photo book.

cta.heading: Every little sprout has a story. 🌱
cta.subtitle: Start yours today. Your memory tree is waiting to bloom.

plants.title: Plant Buddies
plants.subtitle: Each buddy has a personality, stages to unlock, and memories to grow together.

workshop.title: Sprouty Workshop
workshop.subtitle: Everything your child needs to paint, grow, and flourish — in one magical box.

howItWorks.title: Paint Your Pot
howItWorks.desc: Use acrylic paints to decorate your pot any way you like. Your pot, your art — no two pots alike!

howItWorks.title: Choose a Plant Buddy
howItWorks.desc: Pick your favourite buddy — tomato, chilli, beans or corn. Each one has its own personality!

howItWorks.title: Grow Together
howItWorks.desc: Water daily and watch your plant grow. Each milestone adds a new leaf to your digital Memory Tree!

howItWorks.title: Capture Memories
howItWorks.desc: Take photos, record videos, write journal entries. Your digital tree blooms with every memory!

order.title: 🛒 Place Order

upsellCard.title: STEM Mentor
upsellCard.subtitle: Advanced plan only
upsellCard.desc: Upgrade to ESP32 Advanced Kit to unlock Arduino C++, Firebase, and in-depth IoT guidance! 🚀

activate.title: Activate Kit
activate.hint: Enter the PIN printed on your Kit box or scan the QR code to activate your new plant buddy.
activate.scanBtn: 📷 Scan QR Code from Kit box
activate.scanUnsupported: 📷 QR scanning not supported — please type the PIN
activate.scanning: Scanning... point camera at the QR code
activate.footer: Each PIN can only be used once · Found inside your Sprouty Kit box
activate.successMsg: Your new plant buddy has been added to your garden! 🎉
activate.errorFormat: Invalid PIN — must be 6–10 alphanumeric characters.
activate.errorNotFound: PIN not found. Double-check the code on your Kit box.
activate.errorUsed: This PIN has already been used. Each code is single-use.
activate.errorAuth: Please sign in to activate your Kit.
activate.errorDemo: Kit activation is not available in demo mode.
activate.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

standard-kit.name: Standard Kit
standard-kit.subtitle: Pure handcraft
standard-kit.desc: The perfect starter set — a blank pot, seeds, soil and the Sprouty magic!

smart-kit.name: Smart Kit
smart-kit.subtitle: Local IoT · Arduino
smart-kit.desc: Smart Kit with local IoT sensors — OLED shows plant emotions, LEDs glow with status!

advanced-kit.name: Advanced Kit
advanced-kit.subtitle: IoT Cloud · ESP32
advanced-kit.desc: Premium kit with ESP32 Wi-Fi — auto-syncs to the cloud and pings parents' phones!

basic-workshop.name: Basic Workshop
basic-workshop.desc: Paint the pot + plant seeds + Sprouty account setup. Great for kids 4–10 and the whole family!

smart-workshop.name: Smart Kit Workshop
smart-workshop.desc: Wire the circuit + hook up sensors + decorate the pot. For kids 10+ and STEM-loving parents.

advanced-workshop.name: Advanced Workshop
advanced-workshop.desc: Arduino C++ programming + Firebase API. For students 10–18 who want real IoT!
